name: AP Computer Science A
exam_format: Paper/digital; 42 MCQ (90 min) + 4 FRQ (90 min); scored 1-5
notes: Java-based. Unit 9 (Inheritance) removed for 2025-26. Score of 3+ = college credit. Gold-standard HS programming credential. Universally recognized.

name: AP Computer Science Principles
exam_format: 70 MCQ (120 min) + Create Performance Task; scored 1-5
notes: Language-agnostic. Broader than CSA. Includes CT and impact of computing. Universally recognized.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Java
notes: SAS-endorsed. Entry-level Java. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity. Designed ages 14+.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Python
notes: SAS-endorsed. Cross-cuts DS/AI. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: JavaScript
notes: Entry-level JS. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: HTML and CSS
notes: Structure webpages with HTML; apply styles with CSS. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: HTML5 Application Development
notes: Responsive web apps with HTML5/CSS/JS. Overlaps Web & Cloud. 5-year validity.

name: Certiport IT Specialist: Software Development
notes: Covers SDLC; OOP; programming fundamentals. ~$100 voucher. 5-year validity.

name: PCEP - Certified Entry-Level Python Programmer
notes: $59. Entry Python. Cross-cuts DS/AI. No expiry.

name: PCAP - Certified Associate Python Programmer
notes: $295. Intermediate Python incl. OOP. PCEP recommended prereq.

name: PCPP1 - Certified Professional in Python Programming 1
notes: $195-325. Advanced OOP/GUI/networking. Prereq: PCAP. Too advanced for most HS.

name: Oracle Certified Foundations Associate - Java
notes: Novice-level. Designed for HS/college. Free training via Oracle Academy. No experience required.

name: Oracle Certified Associate Java SE 8 Programmer
notes: Associate-level. $245. More rigorous than Foundations. Advanced HS or PS.

name: Oracle Certified Professional - Java
notes: Professional-level. Significant experience required. PS only.

name: Unity Certified User: Programmer
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
notes: C# in Unity. Game dev + interactive media. 150 hrs recommended. ~$100-115 voucher.

name: Unity Certified User: Artist
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
notes: 2D/3D art assets in Unity. Primary home arguably Design & Digital Arts.

name: Unity Certified User: VR Developer
notes: VR experience development in Unity. AR/VR sub-domain. 150 hrs recommended.

name: Unreal Engine 3D Fundamentals
cross_cutting_tags: Arts Entertainment & Design → Design & Digital Arts
notes: NEW Sept 2025. Delivered on Gameplan platform. 2 retakes included. 100 hrs UE5 recommended.

name: App Development with Swift Certified User
notes: iOS app dev with Swift/Xcode. 150 hrs instruction. Aligned to Develop in Swift Fundamentals.

name: App Development with Swift Associate
notes: Exploratory-level; aligned to Develop in Swift Explorations. Lighter than Certified User.

name: CodeHS Python Level 1 Certification
notes: TX IBC approved. Cross-cuts DS/AI. No expiry.

name: CodeHS Web Development Level 1 Certification
notes: TX IBC; PA coming 25-26. Web dev fundamentals.
